items.title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The draining of $20 million from the Bonk treasury highlights vulnerabilities in governance mechanisms, potentially impacting investor confidence in Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Solana activity hits 1 billion milestone – Is a SOL price surge next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Reaching 1 billion transactions signifies strong network activity on Solana, which could enhance liquidity and attract more users and developers to the platform.

items.title: Why 2026 could redefine Ethereum, Solana, Base and Avalanche
items.whyYouShouldCare: The developments in 2026 could reshape competitive dynamics among major blockchains, influencing Solana's market positioning and ecosystem growth.
